method: Kostolany-inspired capital-cycle map. Rates are a primary transmission mechanism, but phase is governed by monetary, liquidity, psychology, market structure, and valuation axes.

market_structure_axis.label: Market structure
market_structure_axis.read: SPX above 50D / 200D; QQQ growth leadership mixed

valuation_axis.label: Valuation
valuation_axis.read: valuation pressure not fully modeled yet

broad_asset_posture.reason: The market is between regimes; confirmation matters more than prediction. Add after 50D reclaim or clean pullback.
broad_asset_posture.condition: Add after 50D reclaim or clean pullback.

phase_rule.condition: Add after 50D reclaim or clean pullback.

broad_asset_posture.tilt: Reduce marginal adds; favor profitable quality
broad_asset_posture.reason: The market is between regimes; confirmation matters more than prediction. Require reset and confirmation.
broad_asset_posture.condition: Require reset and confirmation. Stress adjustment: Reduce marginal adds; favor profitable quality.
broad_asset_posture.stress_adjustment: Reduce marginal adds; favor profitable quality

broad_asset_posture.reason: The market is between regimes; confirmation matters more than prediction. Require breadth improvement.

broad_asset_posture.tilt: Watch, do not accumulate aggressively until rates roll over
broad_asset_posture.reason: The market is between regimes; confirmation matters more than prediction. Add after rate rollover.
broad_asset_posture.condition: Add after rate rollover. Stress adjustment: Watch, do not accumulate aggressively until rates roll over.
broad_asset_posture.stress_adjustment: Watch, do not accumulate aggressively until rates roll over

broad_asset_posture.tilt: Small hedge if real-rate/geopolitical pressure confirms
broad_asset_posture.reason: The market is between regimes; confirmation matters more than prediction. Increase if transition becomes distribution.
broad_asset_posture.condition: Increase if transition becomes distribution. Stress adjustment: Small hedge if real-rate/geopolitical pressure confirms.
broad_asset_posture.stress_adjustment: Small hedge if real-rate/geopolitical pressure confirms

broad_asset_posture.tilt: Conditional if rate pressure is inflation-linked
broad_asset_posture.reason: The market is between regimes; confirmation matters more than prediction. Own only if pressure type is inflationary.
broad_asset_posture.condition: Own only if pressure type is inflationary. Stress adjustment: Conditional if rate pressure is inflation-linked.

phase_rule.condition: Own only if pressure type is inflationary.

broad_asset_posture.stress_adjustment: Conditional if rate pressure is inflation-linked

broad_asset_posture.reason: The market is between regimes; confirmation matters more than prediction. Deploy only after confirmation.
broad_asset_posture.condition: Deploy only after confirmation. Stress adjustment: Higher dry powder.

broad_asset_posture.reason: The market is between regimes; confirmation matters more than prediction. Cut if liquidity weakens.
The market is between regimes; confirmation matters more than prediction. Need route + evidence confirmation.

equity_subcategory_posture.condition: Wait until liquidity and route repair.
Income stability is useful during uncertainty.
No chase if leadership is extended.
Depends on rates, curve, and credit.

invalidation: SPX loses 200D or VIX stress rises above route threshold.

self_check.q1: A1–F notation remains visible but secondary to clear macro labels.
self_check.q2: Center prioritizes capital action first; stress type is shown underneath.
self_check.q3: First production version is clean/minimal; density can be added later.
